'''zhabozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:svanbergite|svanbergite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:svanbergite|svanbergite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhabozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæbezheth|zhæbezheth]] || [[word:zhæbezhej|zhæbezhej]] || [[word:zhæbezhesh|zhæbezhesh]] || [[word:zhæbezhe|zhæbezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabobozhoth|zhabobozhoth]] || [[word:zhabobozhoj|zhabobozhoj]] || [[word:zhabobozhosh|zhabobozhosh]] || [[word:zhabobozho|zhabobozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabozhoth|zhabozhoth]] || [[word:zhabozhoj|zhabozhoj]] || [[word:zhabozhosh|zhabozhosh]] || [[word:zhabozho|zhabozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabofzhoth|zhabofzhoth]] || [[word:zhabofzhoj|zhabofzhoj]] || [[word:zhabofzhosh|zhabofzhosh]] || [[word:zhabofzhof|zhabofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhabozhotho|zhabozhotho]] || [[word:zhabozhojo|zhabozhojo]] || [[word:zhabozhosho|zhabozhosho]] || [[word:zhabozhoko|zhabozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhabozhoth|zhabozhoth]] || [[word:zhabozhoj|zhabozhoj]] || [[word:zhabozhosh|zhabozhosh]] || [[word:zhabozho|zhabozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhabozhothol|zhabozhothol]] || [[word:zhabozhojol|zhabozhojol]] || [[word:zhabozhoshol|zhabozhoshol]] || [[word:zhabozhokol|zhabozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhabozhothotho|zhabozhothotho]] || [[word:zhabozhojojo|zhabozhojojo]] || [[word:zhabozhoshosho|zhabozhoshosho]] || [[word:zhabozhoko|zhabozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhabozhothon|zhabozhothon]] || [[word:zhabozhojon|zhabozhojon]] || [[word:zhabozhoshon|zhabozhoshon]] || [[word:zhabozhokon|zhabozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhabozhothoro|zhabozhothoro]] || [[word:zhabozhojoro|zhabozhojoro]] || [[word:zhabozhoshoro|zhabozhoshoro]] || [[word:zhabozhokoro|zhabozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
